title: Quantity and Composition of Domestic Solid Waste in Kampala City
description: Domestic solid waste generation and composition data for 103 households in Kampala City, Uganda, collected over a seven-day measurement campaign in three parishes representing different income levels (Bwaise I, low income; Bukoto I, middle income; Ggaba, high income), together with household socio-economic characteristics.
citation: Katukiza, A. Y., Niwagaba, C. B., Feni, I., Namagembe, S., Semiyaga, S., Batte, A., and Manga, M.: Quantity and composition of domestic solid waste in Kampala City as influenced by socio-economic factors (manuscript, Makerere University).
keywords: solid waste, waste generation, waste composition, household, socio-economic factors, Kampala, Uganda
geographicDescription: Kampala City, Uganda; parishes Bwaise I (Kawempe Division), Bukoto I (Nakawa Division), and Ggaba (Makindye Division)
